# trapped in tha back of a jeep

**Project:** [[projects/alphabets]]  
**Released:** 2013-02-08  
**Bandcamp:** https://alphabets.bandcamp.com/album/trapped-in-tha-back-of-a-jeep  
**Tracks:** 7  

> trapped in tha back of a jeep by alphabets, released 08 February 2013
> 
> 1. wanter
> 2. monster energy
> 3. dog shades
> 4. money drawing
> 5. candles&amp;kimonos
> 6. user
> 7. trapped in tha back of a jeep
> 
> this album was made while feeling trapped in the throw of drug abuse
